user_scenarios.user_goal: As an operator, verify autonomous hygiene, commit, push, and cleanup execute as separate bounded Worker actions under Supervisor policy.
prerequisites: The unified Supervisor Worker regression suite is available.
The test uses an isolated temporary Git repository.
steps: Seed one isolated autonomous run after Generator and Evaluator evidence.
Reconcile and execute hygiene, commit, push, and cleanup one action at a time.
Inspect action identities and the final run state.
expected_outcomes: Four distinct bounded action leases complete.
Only the commit action invokes Git commit and only the push action invokes push.
The run returns to planning after cleanup.
failure_signals: One process drives multiple rounds directly.
A Git mutation occurs outside the Worker lock.
The final state claims success without bounded action evidence.
cleanup: Pytest removes the temporary Git repository and runtime artifacts.
